buzzNote: big-budget (~Rs.110cr) mythological adventure with modest star power
summaryLine: Lavish visuals, weak writing and bloated runtime make it a tiring watch.
theRead: Critics uniformly praise the film's grand production design, cinematography and mostly solid VFX, calling it visually ambitious on a huge budget. But the consensus knock is a thin, meandering screenplay that leans on the trending Sanatana Dharma theme, plus a punishing three-hour-plus runtime that drains the intrigue. The result is an uneven mythological action-adventure that offers spectacle over substance.
watchIf: Watch if you liked big-canvas mythological treasure-hunt spectacles that prize visuals over story.
